headline: Copart Announces CEO Transition
summary: DALLAS, June 29, 2026--Copart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CPRT) today announced that Jeff Liaw will step down as Chief Executive Officer and director, effective July 31, 2026. The Board has appointed Executive Chairman Jay Adair — who previously led Copart as CEO — to resume the role of Chief Executive Officer effective July 31, 2026. Mr. Liaw will support the transition as Special Advisor to Mr. Adair.
